description: All filter returns every non-root tag
xml: <?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?><dg:chunk xmlns:dg="http://dgml.io/ns/dg#" xmlns:docset="http://dgml.io/acme-corp/msa#" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><docset:IndemnificationClause><docset:IndemnifyingParty dg:origin="2 460 310 1800 355">Vendor</docset:IndemnifyingParty><docset:LiabilityCap xsi:type="decimal" dg:value="500000" dg:origin="2 460 410 1800 455">$500,000</docset:LiabilityCap><docset:EffectiveDate xsi:type="date" dg:value="2024-01-01" dg:origin="2 998 710 1466 755">January 1, 2024</docset:EffectiveDate></docset:IndemnificationClause><docset:PaymentTerms><docset:InvoiceCycle dg:origin="4 460 139 1800 184">Net 30</docset:InvoiceCycle><docset:LatePaymentPenalty xsi:type="decimal" dg:value="0.015" dg:origin="4 460 190 1800 235">1.5% per month</docset:LatePaymentPenalty></docset:PaymentTerms></dg:chunk>

description: Values filter selects leaf-value elements (text holders, no children)
xml: <?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?><dg:chunk xmlns:dg="http://dgml.io/ns/dg#" xmlns:docset="http://dgml.io/acme-corp/msa#" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><docset:IndemnificationClause><docset:IndemnifyingParty dg:origin="2 460 310 1800 355">Vendor</docset:IndemnifyingParty><docset:LiabilityCap xsi:type="decimal" dg:value="500000" dg:origin="2 460 410 1800 455">$500,000</docset:LiabilityCap><docset:EffectiveDate xsi:type="date" dg:value="2024-01-01" dg:origin="2 998 710 1466 755">January 1, 2024</docset:EffectiveDate></docset:IndemnificationClause><docset:PaymentTerms><docset:InvoiceCycle dg:origin="4 460 139 1800 184">Net 30</docset:InvoiceCycle><docset:LatePaymentPenalty xsi:type="decimal" dg:value="0.015" dg:origin="4 460 190 1800 235">1.5% per month</docset:LatePaymentPenalty></docset:PaymentTerms></dg:chunk>

description: Sections filter selects high-betweenness container elements
xml: <?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?><dg:chunk xmlns:dg="http://dgml.io/ns/dg#" xmlns:docset="http://dgml.io/acme-corp/msa#"><docset:Section1><docset:SubA>text a1</docset:SubA><docset:SubB>text b1</docset:SubB><docset:SubC>text c1</docset:SubC></docset:Section1><docset:Section2><docset:SubA>text a2</docset:SubA><docset:SubB>text b2</docset:SubB><docset:SubC>text c2</docset:SubC></docset:Section2><docset:Section3><docset:SubA>text a3</docset:SubA><docset:SubB>text b3</docset:SubB><docset:SubC>text c3</docset:SubC></docset:Section3></dg:chunk>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?><dg:chunk xmlns:dg="http://dgml.io/ns/dg#" xmlns:docset="http://dgml.io/acme-corp/msa#"><docset:DenseClause><docset:FieldA>alpha beta gamma delta epsilon</docset:FieldA><docset:FieldB>one two three four five six seven</docset:FieldB><docset:FieldC>foo bar baz qux quux corge grault</docset:FieldC></docset:DenseClause><docset:SparseClause><docset:TagX>x</docset:TagX></docset:SparseClause></dg:chunk>

description: Patterns filter selects tags with highest structural entropy
Structural dg: elements excluded by default from all filters
Single tag type only in document
xml: <?xml version='1.0' encoding='utf-8'?><dg:chunk xmlns:dg="http://dgml.io/ns/dg#" xmlns:docset="http://dgml.io/acme-corp/msa#"><docset:Amount dg:origin="1 100 200 400 230">$1,000</docset:Amount><docset:Amount dg:origin="1 100 300 400 330">$2,000</docset:Amount><docset:Amount dg:origin="1 100 400 400 430">$3,000</docset:Amount></dg:chunk>

description: Deeply nested content: Values picks innermost leaf elements
